payload.text:
You are a senior full-stack web developer and SEO expert.

I want you to build a FULLY PROFESSIONAL, production-ready, Google AdSense-friendly HEALTH TOOL WEBSITE for my domain:

Domain Name: fitliquidlife.com

Website Purpose:
A global health & fitness tools website focused on liquid nutrition such as water intake, smoothies, juices, detox drinks, and protein shakes.

Target Audience:
Worldwide users (India, USA, UK, Canada, Australia)

Website Type:
Multi-tool health calculator website
100% free tools
No login required

--------------------------------------------------
DESIGN REQUIREMENTS
--------------------------------------------------
• Modern, clean, professional UI
• Mobile-first responsive design
• Fast loading & lightweight
• White + light green + blue health color palette
• Proper spacing, readable fonts
• AdSense-safe layout (no misleading UI)

--------------------------------------------------
HOMEPAGE STRUCTURE
--------------------------------------------------
Create a complete SEO-optimized homepage with:

1. Hero Section
   - Headline: "Smart Drink & Hydration Calculators for a Healthier Life"
   - Subheadline: "Calculate water, smoothie, juice, detox & protein intake – 100% free"
   - CTA button: Explore Tools

2. Tool Categories Section
   - Water & Hydration Tools
   - Smoothie & Juice Tools
   - Detox & Wellness Tools
   - Fitness Drink Tools

3. Featured Tools Section (cards with short descriptions)

4. Why Choose FitLiquidLife Section
   - Free tools
   - No login
   - Accurate calculations
   - Global health standards

5. SEO Content Section (300+ words)
   - Explain liquid nutrition importance
   - Hydration benefits
   - Smoothie & detox advantages

6. Footer
   - About
   - Contact
   - Privacy Policy
   - Disclaimer
   - Terms of Service

--------------------------------------------------
TOOLS TO CREATE (FULLY WORKING)
--------------------------------------------------
Create individual tool pages with real working JavaScript logic:

1. Daily Water Intake Calculator
2. Body Weight Hydration Calculator
3. Smoothie Calories Calculator
4. Juice Sugar Calculator
5. Detox Drink Planner
6. Protein Shake Calculator
7. BMI Calculator
8. Fat Burn Drink Suggestion Tool
9. Post-Workout Drink Tool
10. Immunity Boost Drink Tool

--------------------------------------------------
EACH TOOL PAGE MUST HAVE
--------------------------------------------------
• SEO-friendly URL
• H1 tool title
• 150–200 words SEO description
• Clean input form
• Calculate button
• Result output box
• 3–5 FAQs (schema-friendly)
• Health disclaimer
• Responsive layout

--------------------------------------------------
TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS
--------------------------------------------------
• Pure HTML, CSS, JavaScript (NO API calls)
• Client-side calculation logic
• Clean & commented code
• Separate files:
  - index.html
  - tools pages
  - style.css
  - script.js
• Optimized for Core Web Vitals
• Ready to upload on Hostinger

--------------------------------------------------
SEO REQUIREMENTS
--------------------------------------------------
• Meta title & meta description for every page
• Proper H1-H3 structure
• Internal linking between tools
• Keyword-optimized content
• AdSense approval friendly structure

--------------------------------------------------
DELIVERY FORMAT
--------------------------------------------------
Provide:
1. Full homepage code
2. Individual tool page codes
3. Common CSS file
4. Common JS file
5. SEO meta tags
6. Short setup instructions

IMPORTANT:
The website must look premium, professional, trustworthy, and suitable for long-term monetization.

Do NOT give explanations. Only give complete working code and content.

**Defining the Target Niche**

I'm now focusing on the target audience for FitLiquidLife.com, centering on global health and fitness enthusiasts who prioritize liquid nutrition – water, smoothies, juices, protein shakes, and the like. This informs the site's overall design and user interface. I'm building with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, per the developer's notes.


**Outlining Site Architecture**

I've sketched out the initial site structure for FitLiquidLife.com, mapping out the components and pages. I'm prioritizing a clean, mobile-responsive design, and focusing on user navigation. I'm leveraging React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, as before. I've chosen light green, blue, white, and gray as the core color scheme, emphasizing a health-focused aesthetic. The site will have a sidebar or header and use clean cards for the tools. The utilities will exist separately from the layout for improved reuse. I'm focusing on incorporating AdSense seamlessly. The specific tools will include calculators for Daily Water Intake, and Body Weight Hydration, among others.


**Refining Tool Specifications**

I'm now refining the specifications for each tool on FitLiquidLife.com, distinguishing clearly between the tools. For example, "Daily Water" is general, while "Body Weight Hydration" is weight-based. I'm fleshing out details for "Smoothie Calories", "Juice Sugar", and "Detox Drink Planner", along with "Protein Shake" and "Fat Burn Drink" suggestions. I'm also including a BMI calculator, post-workout ratio suggestions, and immunity booster recommendations.

I have a preliminary sitemap with all the tools. My initial setup also has a file list including index.html with TailwindCSS, and the main TypeScript index with the necessary components. I also have an App.tsx file that handles the routing for my tools, as well as several components and pages that will be needed.


**Organizing Content & Structure**

I'm now determining content organization and structure. I will make each page have H1, H2, and H3 tags, and meta tags within each tool, using an SEO helper. The file count will be manageable, with tool components grouped for brevity, ensuring functionality. I will also be creating the necessary AdSense pages. I have calculated the equations to use for each tool. I've created a preliminary file list, which includes `metadata.json`, `index.html`, `index.tsx`, `App.tsx`, and the other components and pages needed to run the tools.


**Finalizing Tool Implementation**

I'm currently focused on the `pages` directory for tool-specific pages like `DetoxPlanner.tsx`, `FatBurnDrink.tsx`, `PostWorkout.tsx`, and others. React Router is set up for navigation. I'm checking for responsive padding and calculation accuracy across the 10 tools, with SEO descriptions embedded within the code. Finally, I'm confirming that the React-based setup and Tailwind CSS, as per system instructions, is used for maximum hosting flexibility and modern implementation.

entries.description: Application metadata containing the name, description and required permissions.
The primary HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Font Awesome integration.
Application entry point initializing React and the root element.
Global type definitions for the application.
Constant data for tools, categories, and FAQs.

import { Tool } from './types';

export const TOOLS: Tool[] = [
  {
    id: 'daily-water',
    name: 'Daily Water Intake Calculator',
    description: 'Determine exactly how much water you need daily based on weight and activity levels.',
    icon: 'fa-droplet',
    path: '/water-intake',
    category: 'hydration'
  },
  {
    id: 'weight-hydration',
    name: 'Body Weight Hydration Tool',
    description: 'Specific hydration metrics focused strictly on your body mass index and weight class.',
    icon: 'fa-weight-scale',
    path: '/weight-hydration',
    category: 'hydration'
  },
  {
    id: 'smoothie-calories',
    name: 'Smoothie Calories Calculator',
    description: 'Track the nutritional value of your custom smoothie recipes with ease.',
    icon: 'fa-blender',
    path: '/smoothie-calculator',
    category: 'smoothie'
  },
  {
    id: 'juice-sugar',
    name: 'Juice Sugar Calculator',
    description: 'Estimate the natural sugar content in your favorite fresh-pressed juices.',
    icon: 'fa-glass-water',
    path: '/juice-sugar',
    category: 'smoothie'
  },
  {
    id: 'detox-planner',
    name: 'Detox Drink Planner',
    description: 'Plan your weekly detox schedule with personalized liquid recipes.',
    icon: 'fa-leaf',
    path: '/detox-planner',
    category: 'detox'
  },
  {
    id: 'protein-shake',
    name: 'Protein Shake Calculator',
    description: 'Calculate the optimal protein amount for your post-workout recovery shakes.',
    icon: 'fa-dumbbell',
    path: '/protein-calculator',
    category: 'fitness'
  },
  {
    id: 'bmi-calc',
    name: 'Body Mass Index (BMI) Calc',
    description: 'Quickly find your BMI and see how it impacts your hydration needs.',
    icon: 'fa-heart-pulse',
    path: '/bmi-calculator',
    category: 'fitness'
  },
  {
    id: 'fat-burn-drink',
    name: 'Fat Burn Drink Suggestion',
    description: 'Get recommendations for metabolic-boosting drinks based on your goals.',
    icon: 'fa-fire',
    path: '/fat-burn-suggestion',
    category: 'fitness'
  },
  {
    id: 'post-workout',
    name: 'Post-Workout Drink Tool',
    description: 'The perfect carbohydrate-to-protein ratio for your recovery needs.',
    icon: 'fa-person-running',
    path: '/post-workout-drink',
    category: 'fitness'
  },
  {
    id: 'immunity-boost',
    name: 'Immunity Boost Drink Tool',
    description: 'Vitamin-rich drink suggestions to strengthen your immune system.',
    icon: 'fa-shield-virus',
    path: '/immunity-boost',
    category: 'detox'
  }
];

export const CATEGORIES = [
  { id: 'hydration', name: 'Water & Hydration', icon: 'fa-faucet-drip', color: 'bg-blue-500' },
  { id: 'smoothie', name: 'Smoothie & Juice', icon: 'fa-carrot', color: 'bg-orange-500' },
  { id: 'detox', name: 'Detox & Wellness', icon: 'fa-seedling', color: 'bg-green-500' },
  { id: 'fitness', name: 'Fitness Drinks', icon: 'fa-bolt', color: 'bg-indigo-500' }
];

{/* Hero Section */}

Smart Drink & Hydration
Calculators for a Healthier Life

Calculate water, smoothie, juice, detox & protein intake accurately. Free professional health tools for your daily liquid nutrition.

Explore Tools 100% Free • No Login Required
{/* Decorative elements */}

{CATEGORIES.map((cat) => (

{cat.name}

))}
{/* Featured Tools Grid */}

Our Health Calculators

Scientifically calibrated tools for your liquid nutrition goals.

{TOOLS.map((tool) => (

{tool.name}

{tool.description}

Launch Tool ))}
{/* Why Choose Section */}

Why Thousands Choose
FitLiquidLife Every Day

100% Free Forever

No subscriptions, no fees, no hidden costs. Just pure utility.

No Login Required

We value your privacy. Use any tool instantly without signing up.

Accurate Formulas

Calculations based on international hydration and nutrition standards.

Global

Health Standards

{/* SEO Content Section */}

The Importance of Liquid Nutrition

Liquid nutrition is often the most overlooked component of a successful fitness journey. Whether it's staying adequately hydrated with our Daily Water Intake Calculator or optimizing your recovery with a Protein Shake Calculator, what you drink is just as important as what you eat.

Our hydration tools are designed to provide localized and personalized results for users across the USA, UK, India, and beyond. Water plays a crucial role in metabolism, joint health, and cognitive function. By using our Body Weight Hydration Tool, you can ensure your body has the resources it needs to perform at its peak.

Smoothies and fresh juices provide a concentrated burst of vitamins and minerals. However, they can also be high in calories and sugars. Our Smoothie Calories Calculator and Juice Sugar Calculator empower you to enjoy these treats without sabotaging your dietary goals.

Detoxification is another key pillar of wellness. FitLiquidLife's Detox Drink Planner helps you create a sustainable schedule that supports your liver and kidneys naturally. Explore our full suite of 10+ professional tools today and take the guesswork out of your health.

); }; export default Home;

payload.text: Create the Juice Sugar Calculator page. It should allow users to input the type and quantity of fruit, and estimate the sugar content using average values. Include relevant FAQs and a disclaimer. The URL should be '/juice-sugar'.

**Designing Juice Sugar Calculator**

I'm currently focused on the "Juice Sugar Calculator" page for `FitLiquidLife`. I've created the `JuiceSugar.tsx` file and integrated the `ToolLayout` component. The next step is to implement the core sugar content calculation logic, and define how users will interact with the calculator, e.g. how they will select ingredients. I plan to handle the calculation of sugar content per 100g, and per serving, and integrate ingredient lookups.

entries.description: Create the Juice Sugar Calculator page with fruit selection and sugar estimation logic.
Update routing to include the Juice Sugar Calculator page.
